applicable_policies.title: XX证券业务招待费管理办法

applicable_clauses.text: 业务招待单次活动费用不得超过5000元
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: R900005 expense_date 2025-03-12 falls under current effective period; rule governs all business_entertainment expenses

applicable_clauses.text: 业务招待费用按参与人数核算,人均不得超过300元
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: R900005 is business_entertainment with 10 participants; per-person calculation required

applicable_clauses.text: 同一客户拜访或同一会议安排不得拆分为多个报销事项

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: 已废止; 现行制度为2025修订版
